chemistry_overall: Candidates 2 and 3 have hard-gate mixing failures and insufficient conversion. Candidates 1 and 4 are viable but need concentration adjustment for better kinetics. Candidates 5 and 6 have dual-criterion mixing failures requiring blocking. Candidates 7 and 8 are viable with good mixing but need longer residence times for optimal conversion. Candidates 9, 11, and 12 have hard-gate mixing failures. Only candidate 10 is viable with good conversion.

Three candidates have hard-gate mixing failures, one candidate passes all hard gates but has practical length concerns.
